name: AA_SARF_PROJE_123_BURAK
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[AA_SARF_PROJE_123_BURAK] AS

WITH CombinedData AS (
    SELECT 
        YEAR(F.DATE_) AS YEAR_,
        MONTH(F.DATE_) AS MONTH_,
        F.DATE_ AS DATE_,
        F.FICHENO AS FISNO,
        P.CODE AS IS_EMRI_N0,
        P.NAME AS IS_EMRI_ADI,
        P.ENDDATE AS ENDDATE,
        S.CODE AS STOK_KODU,
        S.NAME AS STOK_ADI,
        AMOUNT AS MIKTAR,
        U.CODE AS BRIM,
        CAST(CAST(
            ISNULL(
                CASE 
                    WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF = S.LOGICALREF AND PRICE > 0 AND TRCODE = 1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
                    THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF = S.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC)
                    ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF = S.LOGICALREF AND PRICE > 0 AND TRCODE = 1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)
                END, 0
            ) AS DECIMAL(18,2)
        ) AS FLOAT) AS BRIM_FIYAT,
        CAST(CAST(
            ISNULL(
                CASE 
                    WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF = S.LOGICALREF AND PRICE > 0 AND TRCODE = 1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
                    THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF = S.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC)
                    ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF = S.LOGICALREF AND PRICE > 0 AND TRCODE = 1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)
                END, 0
            ) AS DECIMAL(18,2)
        ) AS FLOAT) * L.AMOUNT AS TUTAR,
        CASE SUBSTRING((SELECT CODE FROM LG_123_PROJECT WHERE LOGICALREF = L.PROJECTREF), 1, 2) 
            WHEN 'G0' THEN 'GLADIATOR KABIN'
            WHEN 'G1' THEN 'GLADIATOR KABIN'
            WHEN 'R0' THEN 'RONIN KABIN'
            WHEN 'RX' THEN 'RONIN XL'
            WHEN 'FO' THEN 'RONIN KABINR'
            WHEN 'F0' THEN 'FREDOOM'
            WHEN 'T0' THEN 'TROY'
            WHEN 'MC' THEN 'MOHICAN'
            WHEN 'RV' THEN 'REVIVA'
            WHEN 'GL' THEN 'GLADIATOR XL'
            WHEN 'PA' THEN 'PAN ANATOLIA'
            WHEN '20' THEN 'AKSESUAR'
        END AS TUR,
        (SELECT MAX(MONTH(DATE_)) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE PROJECTREF = L.PROJECTREF AND TRCODE IN (7,8)) AS SATIS_AY,
        (SELECT MAX(YEAR(DATE_)) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE PROJECTREF = L.PROJECTREF AND TRCODE IN (7,8)) AS SATIS_YIL,
        CASE 
            WHEN S.STGRPCODE = 'ARABA' THEN 'ARABA'
            WHEN S.STGRPCODE = 'OTV' THEN 'OTV'
            ELSE CASE 
                WHEN L.STOCKREF IN (
                    SELECT STCREF FROM LG_123_STCOMPLN WHERE MAINCREF IN (
                        SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF = P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE = 1
                    )
                ) OR L.STOCKREF IN (
                    SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF = P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE = 1 AND LINENO_ <> 1
                )
                THEN 'OPSIYONEL'
                WHEN L.STOCKREF IN (
                    SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF = P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE = 1 AND LINENO_ = 1
                )
                THEN 'STANDART'
                ELSE 'STANDART'
            END
        END AS RECETE_TURU,
        P.CODE AS PROJE_KODU
    FROM LG_123_01_STLINE AS L
    INNER JOIN LG_123_01_STFICHE AS F ON F.LOGICALREF = L.STFICHEREF
    INNER JOIN LG_123_ITEMS AS S ON S.LOGICALREF = L.STOCKREF
    INNER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL AS U ON U.LOGICALREF = L.UOMREF
    INNER JOIN LG_123_PROJECT AS P ON P.LOGICALREF = L.PROJECTREF
    WHERE F.TRCODE IN (25) AND L.SOURCEINDEX IN (2,11) AND S.CARDTYPE <> 11 AND F.DATE_ >= '20230403'

    UNION ALL

    SELECT 
        YEAR(F.DATE_) AS YEAR_,
        MONTH(F.DATE_) AS MONTH_,
        F.DATE_ AS DATE_,
        F.FICHENO AS FISNO,
        P.CODE AS IS_EMRI_N0,
        P.NAME AS IS_EMRI_ADI,
        P.ENDDATE AS ENDDATE,
        S.CODE AS STOK_KODU,
        S.NAME AS STOK_ADI,
        AMOUNT AS MIKTAR,
        U.CODE AS BRIM,
        CAST(CAST(
            ISNULL(
                CASE 
                    WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF = S.LOGICALREF AND PRICE > 0 AND TRCODE = 13 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
                    THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF = S.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC)
                    ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF = S.LOGICALREF AND PRICE > 0 AND TRCODE = 13 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)
                END, 0
            ) AS DECIMAL(18,2)
        ) AS FLOAT) AS BRIM_FIYAT,
        CAST(CAST(
            ISNULL(
                CASE 
                    WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF = S.LOGICALREF AND PRICE > 0 AND TRCODE = 13 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
                    THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF = S.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC)
                    ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF = S.LOGICALREF AND PRICE > 0 AND TRCODE = 13 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)
                END, 0
            ) AS DECIMAL(18,2)
        ) AS FLOAT) * L.AMOUNT AS TUTAR,
        CASE SUBSTRING((SELECT CODE FROM LG_123_PROJECT WHERE LOGICALREF = L.PROJECTREF), 1, 2) 
            WHEN 'G0' THEN 'GLADIATOR KABIN'
            WHEN 'G1' THEN 'GLADIATOR KABIN'
            WHEN 'R0' THEN 'RONIN KABIN'
            WHEN 'RX' THEN 'RONIN XL'
            WHEN 'FO' THEN 'RONIN KABINR'
            WHEN 'F0' THEN 'FREDOOM'
            WHEN 'T0' THEN 'TROY'
            WHEN 'MC' THEN 'MOHICAN'
            WHEN 'RV' THEN 'REVIVA'
            WHEN 'GL' THEN 'GLADIATOR XL'
            WHEN 'PA' THEN 'PAN ANATOLIA'
            WHEN '20' THEN 'AKSESUAR'
        END AS TUR,
        (SELECT MAX(MONTH(DATE_)) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE PROJECTREF = L.PROJECTREF AND TRCODE IN (7,8)) AS SATIS_AY,
        (SELECT MAX(YEAR(DATE_)) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE PROJECTREF = L.PROJECTREF AND TRCODE IN (7,8)) AS SATIS_YIL,
        CASE 
            WHEN S.STGRPCODE = 'ARABA' THEN 'ARABA'
            WHEN S.STGRPCODE = 'OTV' THEN 'OTV'
            ELSE CASE 
                WHEN L.STOCKREF IN (
                    SELECT STCREF FROM LG_123_STCOMPLN WHERE MAINCREF IN (
                        SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF = P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE = 1
                    )
                ) OR L.STOCKREF IN (
                    SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF = P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE = 1 AND LINENO_ <> 1
                )
                THEN 'OPSIYONEL'
                WHEN L.STOCKREF IN (
                    SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF = P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE = 1 AND LINENO_ = 1
                )
                THEN 'STANDART'
                ELSE 'STANDART'
            END
        END AS RECETE_TURU,
        P.CODE AS PROJE_KODU
    FROM LG_123_01_STLINE AS L
    INNER JOIN LG_123_01_STFICHE AS F ON F.LOGICALREF = L.STFICHEREF
    INNER JOIN LG_123_ITEMS AS S ON S.LOGICALREF = L.STOCKREF
    INNER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL AS U ON U.LOGICALREF = L.UOMREF
    INNER JOIN LG_123_PROJECT AS P ON P.LOGICALREF = L.PROJECTREF
    WHERE F.TRCODE IN (25) AND L.SOURCEINDEX IN (2,11) AND S.CARDTYPE = 11 AND F.DATE_ >= '20230403'

    UNION ALL

    -- Negative amounts for DESTINDEX = 5 and IOCODE = 2 (Sarf Fişleri)
    SELECT 
        YEAR(F.DATE_) AS YEAR_,
        MONTH(F.DATE_) AS MONTH_,
        F.DATE_ AS DATE_,
        F.FICHENO AS FISNO,
        P.CODE AS IS_EMRI_N0,
        P.NAME AS IS_EMRI_ADI,
        P.ENDDATE AS ENDDATE,
        S.CODE AS STOK_KODU,
        S.NAME AS STOK_ADI,
        AMOUNT * -1 AS MIKTAR,
        U.CODE AS BRIM,
        CAST(CAST(
            ISNULL(
                CASE 
                    WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF = S.LOGICALREF AND PRICE > 0 AND TRCODE = 1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
                    THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF = S.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC)
                    ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF = S.LOGICALREF AND PRICE > 0 AND TRCODE = 1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)
                END, 0
            ) AS DECIMAL(18,2)
        ) AS FLOAT) * -1 AS BRIM_FIYAT,
        (CAST(CAST(
            ISNULL(
                CASE 
                    WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF = S.LOGICALREF AND PRICE > 0 AND TRCODE = 1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
                    THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF = S.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC)
                    ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF = S.LOGICALREF AND PRICE > 0 AND TRCODE = 1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)
                END, 0
            ) AS DECIMAL(18,2)
        ) AS FLOAT) * L.AMOUNT) * -1 AS TUTAR,
        CASE SUBSTRING((SELECT CODE FROM LG_123_PROJECT WHERE LOGICALREF = L.PROJECTREF), 1, 2) 
            WHEN 'G0' THEN 'GLADIATOR KABIN'
            WHEN 'G1' THEN 'GLADIATOR KABIN'
            WHEN 'R0' THEN 'RONIN KABIN'
            WHEN 'RX' THEN 'RONIN XL'
            WHEN 'FO' THEN 'RONIN KABINR'
            WHEN 'F0' THEN 'FREDOOM'
            WHEN 'T0' THEN 'TROY'
            WHEN 'MC' THEN 'MOHICAN'
            WHEN 'RV' THEN 'REVIVA'
            WHEN 'GL' THEN 'GLADIATOR XL'
            WHEN 'PA' THEN 'PAN ANATOLIA'
            WHEN '20' THEN 'AKSESUAR'
        END AS TUR,
        (SELECT MAX(MONTH(DATE_)) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE PROJECTREF = L.PROJECTREF AND TRCODE IN (7,8)) AS SATIS_AY,
        (SELECT MAX(YEAR(DATE_)) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE PROJECTREF = L.PROJECTREF AND TRCODE IN (7,8)) AS SATIS_YIL,
        CASE 
            WHEN S.STGRPCODE = 'ARABA' THEN 'ARABA'
            WHEN S.STGRPCODE = 'OTV' THEN 'OTV'
            ELSE CASE 
                WHEN L.STOCKREF IN (
                    SELECT STCREF FROM LG_123_STCOMPLN WHERE MAINCREF IN (
                        SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF = P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE = 1
                    )
                ) OR L.STOCKREF IN (
                    SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF = P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE = 1 AND LINENO_ <> 1
                )
                THEN 'OPSIYONEL'
                WHEN L.STOCKREF IN (
                    SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF = P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE = 1 AND LINENO_ = 1
                )
                THEN 'STANDART'
                ELSE 'STANDART'
            END
        END AS RECETE_TURU,
        P.CODE AS PROJE_KODU
    FROM LG_123_01_STLINE AS L
    INNER JOIN LG_123_01_STFICHE AS F ON F.LOGICALREF = L.STFICHEREF
    INNER JOIN LG_123_ITEMS AS S ON S.LOGICALREF = L.STOCKREF
    INNER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL AS U ON U.LOGICALREF = L.UOMREF
    INNER JOIN LG_123_PROJECT AS P ON P.LOGICALREF = L.PROJECTREF
    WHERE F.TRCODE IN (25) AND L.DESTINDEX IN (5) AND L.IOCODE = 2 AND S.CARDTYPE <> 11 AND F.DATE_ >= '20230403'

    UNION ALL

    SELECT 
        YEAR(F.DATE_) AS YEAR_,
        MONTH(F.DATE_) AS MONTH_,
        F.DATE_ AS DATE_,
        F.FICHENO AS FISNO,
        P.CODE AS IS_EMRI_N0,
        P.NAME AS IS_EMRI_ADI,
        P.ENDDATE AS ENDDATE,
        S.CODE AS STOK_KODU,
        S.NAME AS STOK_ADI,
        AMOUNT * -1 AS MIKTAR,
        U.CODE AS BRIM,
        CAST(CAST(
            ISNULL(
                CASE 
                    WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF = S.LOGICALREF AND PRICE > 0 AND TRCODE = 13 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
                    THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF = S.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC)
                    ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF = S.LOGICALREF AND PRICE > 0 AND TRCODE = 13 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)
                END, 0
            ) AS DECIMAL(18,2)
        ) AS FLOAT) * -1 AS BRIM_FIYAT,
        (CAST(CAST(
            ISNULL(
                CASE 
                    WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF = S.LOGICALREF AND PRICE > 0 AND TRCODE = 13 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
                    THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF = S.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC)
                    ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF = S.LOGICALREF AND PRICE > 0 AND TRCODE = 13 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)
                END, 0
            ) AS DECIMAL(18,2)
        ) AS FLOAT) * L.AMOUNT) * -1 AS TUTAR,
        CASE SUBSTRING((SELECT CODE FROM LG_123_PROJECT WHERE LOGICALREF = L.PROJECTREF), 1, 2) 
            WHEN 'G0' THEN 'GLADIATOR KABIN'
            WHEN 'G1' THEN 'GLADIATOR KABIN'
            WHEN 'R0' THEN 'RONIN KABIN'
            WHEN 'RX' THEN 'RONIN XL'
            WHEN 'FO' THEN 'RONIN KABINR'
            WHEN 'F0' THEN 'FREDOOM'
            WHEN 'T0' THEN 'TROY'
            WHEN 'MC' THEN 'MOHICAN'
            WHEN 'RV' THEN 'REVIVA'
            WHEN 'GL' THEN 'GLADIATOR XL'
            WHEN 'PA' THEN 'PAN ANATOLIA'
            WHEN '20' THEN 'AKSESUAR'
        END AS TUR,
        (SELECT MAX(MONTH(DATE_)) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE PROJECTREF = L.PROJECTREF AND TRCODE IN (7,8)) AS SATIS_AY,
        (SELECT MAX(YEAR(DATE_)) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE PROJECTREF = L.PROJECTREF AND TRCODE IN (7,8)) AS SATIS_YIL,
        CASE 
            WHEN S.STGRPCODE = 'ARABA' THEN 'ARABA'
            WHEN S.STGRPCODE = 'OTV' THEN 'OTV'
            ELSE CASE 
                WHEN L.STOCKREF IN (
                    SELECT STCREF FROM LG_123_STCOMPLN WHERE MAINCREF IN (
                        SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF = P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE = 1
                    )
                ) OR L.STOCKREF IN (
                    SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF = P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE = 1 AND LINENO_ <> 1
                )
                THEN 'OPSIYONEL'
                WHEN L.STOCKREF IN (
                    SELECT STOCKREF FROM LG_123_01_ORFLINE WHERE PROJECTREF = P.LOGICALREF AND TRCODE = 1 AND LINENO_ = 1
                )
                THEN 'STANDART'
                ELSE 'STANDART'
            END
        END AS RECETE_TURU,
        P.CODE AS PROJE_KODU
    FROM LG_123_01_STLINE AS L
    INNER JOIN LG_123_01_STFICHE AS F ON F.LOGICALREF = L.STFICHEREF
    INNER JOIN LG_123_ITEMS AS S ON S.LOGICALREF = L.STOCKREF
    INNER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL AS U ON U.LOGICALREF = L.UOMREF
    INNER JOIN LG_123_PROJECT AS P ON P.LOGICALREF = L.PROJECTREF
    WHERE F.TRCODE IN (25) AND L.DESTINDEX IN (5) AND L.IOCODE = 2 AND S.CARDTYPE = 11 AND F.DATE_ >= '20230403'
),
FilteredData AS (
    SELECT *,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY YEAR_, MONTH_, DATE_, FISNO, IS_EMRI_N0, STOK_KODU
            ORDER BY CASE WHEN MIKTAR < 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
        ) AS RowNum
    FROM CombinedData
)
SELECT YEAR_, MONTH_, DATE_, FISNO, IS_EMRI_N0, IS_EMRI_ADI, ENDDATE,
       STOK_KODU, STOK_ADI, MIKTAR, BRIM, BRIM_FIYAT, TUTAR, TUR,
       SATIS_AY, SATIS_YIL, RECETE_TURU, PROJE_KODU
FROM FilteredData
WHERE RowNum = 1;

--	ISNULL
--	(CASE WHEN 
	
--	(sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=S.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE CARDREF=S.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
--	ELSE (sELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK)  WHERE STOCKREF=S.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE=1 ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float)*L.AMOUNT  TUTAR
